title: Mount Hoffman and Lake Tenaya — 3-scene fixture

scenes.image: Wide alpine meadow at first light, dew on grass, distant snowy peaks, soft golden rim light, oil-painting feel
scenes.motion: very slow push-in toward the distant peaks, light wind animating the grass

beats.text: We crossed the meadow in the gray of dawn, the grass cold and silver with dew.
Eastward, the great peaks held the first thin light of the sun.

scenes.image: Granite ridge approaching Mount Hoffman, glacial polish on the rock, sparse pines, bright noon sun
scenes.motion: slow pan left to right across the ridge, gentle parallax

beats.text: By midday the ridge laid itself bare to the sun, granite polished by ages of ice.

scenes.image: Lake Tenaya from the high ridge, deep blue water, ringed by pale granite domes, late afternoon
scenes.motion: slow tilt down from sky to lake surface, water shimmer animated

beats.text: From the high ridge we looked down on Lake Tenaya, a blue stone set in white granite.
Nothing else moved, save the lake's surface answering the wind.
